translations.To allow this check to run you have to m: To allow this check to run you have to make sure that your Web server can connect to itself. Therefore it must be able to resolve and connect to at least one of its `trusted_domains` or the `overwrite.cli.url`. This failure may be the result of a server-side DNS mismatch or outbound firewall rule.
